title: Tao Te Ching 67
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 67 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 67 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Everyone says my Tao is great and resembles nothing else. It is great precisely because it resembles nothing.
